summary: Iter 196 — Statutory Registration Portal-Form + LIVE VIEW + OTP handoff + one-click Register regression PASSED end-to-end. Backend: 13/14 pytest tests pass (1 skipped by design — no foreign company_admin credentials available in this env). Coverage: GET /api/admin/statutory/{esic|uan}/employee/{user_id}/prefill returns {ok, employee, snapshot, validation, duplicate, registration, settings} with company_name populated (Kankani Enterprises) and validation.ok present; 400 for unknown portal; 401/403 without token. POST /api/admin/statutory/uan/bulk with a single ready employee returns total=1, results[0].status='queued' (Kankani has EPFO creds); statutory_registrations doc created with rpa_job_id linked. GET /api/admin/portal-automation/jobs/{job_id}/live returns {ok:true, job_id, status, steps[], live_frame_base64, live_frame_at, live_url, manual_reason, error, result}; 404 for unknown job. POST /api/admin/portal-automation/jobs/{job_id}/otp: writes otp_input={code} on awaiting_otp job → ok:true; 400 on 'ab' (needs 4-8 digits); 400 when status != awaiting_otp ('Job is not waiting for an OTP right now'); 404 on unknown job. FRONTEND (super admin, 1440x900, Kankani cmp_527fecdd7c): /statutory-registration?portal=esic Eligible tab shows 97 ready rows each with three buttons — testID btn-register-{uid}, btn-form-{uid}, btn-link-{uid} — matching spec exactly. Clicking 'Form' navigates to /statutory-registration-form?portal=esic&user_id={uid} (verified URL). Form page renders header 'ESIC — Register New Insured Person (Form-1)', 8-chip flow strip (Eligibility → Aadhaar Auth (OTP) → UIDAI Details → Mobile Verify → Employment → Dispensary → Family → IP No. + e-Pehchan), 4 stepped sections (Step 1 Aadhaar & Mobile Verification with pre-filled Aadhaar 877823355262, Step 2 Employee Details ALI HASAN/SAMSUDIN/01-01-1983/Male/PAN AAAAA9999A, Step 3 Employment code 65 · DoA 01-07-2019 · BEAM GATTER · WEAVING, Step 4 Present Address), Dispensary & Family card, Nominee card, right sidebar 'Actions' with blue 'Register on Portal Now' + 'Save details only' + 'Already have an IP number? Link it' input + Link button, plus 'Pre-registration checks' listing '! Address missing', '! Mobile number missing/incomplete', '! Not mandatorily eligible: Monthly salary not set', '✓ All mandatory checks passed'. UAN form variant loads at /statutory-registration-form?portal=uan&user_id=... with header 'EPFO — New Member Registration (Form-11)' and its own flow strip (Eligibility → Aadhaar Verify → Member Details → Employment → UAN Generated → Member ID). Clicking 'Register on Portal Now' on the UAN form queues the job and LiveRunViewer (testID live-run-viewer) appears IMMEDIATELY on the sidebar showing 'QUEUED — worker starting…' + 'Connecting to the government portal…' + 'Waiting for the automation worker to pick up the job (≈30s)…'; within ~15s the RPA worker picks it up, attempts the EPFO portal, gets blocked (as expected from datacenter IP 34.7.135.173), and the ACTION REQUIRED badge + live frame screenshot appear on the same panel. ONE-CLICK 'Register on Portal' from Eligible tab: clicking btn-register-{uid} creates+submits+queues in one shot and auto-opens the detail modal with the LiveRunViewer showing URL bar 'https://unifiedportal-emp.epfindia.gov.in/epfo/', a live JPEG frame of the actual portal 'Web Page Blocked!' screen, 'Last run' note 'Portal blocked the request: block Web Page Blocked! ... URL: unifiedportal-emp.epfindia.gov.in/epfo/ Client IP: 34.7.135.173 Attack ID: 20000 — the portal is blocking this server's IP', ACTION REQUIRED badge, and Submit / Retry / Form-11 PDF action buttons — proving live streaming works end-to-end. Sidebar shows 'Statutory Registration' group. Correct govt portal URLs are hit (portal.esic.gov.in for ESIC, unifiedportal-emp.epfindia.gov.in/epfo/ for EPFO). CLEANUP: deleted the 2 statutory_registrations + linked portal_automation_jobs created during UI testing (esr_8886857a76b2 / paj_24ae8e079627 and esr_a0ada34d4260 / paj_453a6e25742f). test_zzz_cleanup in the pytest file removes any TEST_JOB_ docs. NO user aadhaar/uan/esi_ip fields were written to during UI portion (the two triggered jobs stopped at portal-blocked before allotment).

issues: Pre-existing (not introduced this iter): 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow); invalid style properties outline/background/padding shorthand. Long-standing noise across many screens — already flagged in iter 194/195.

action_items: Nothing critical. All 9 items from the review request verified.

Optional polish: EPFO flow strip is 6 chips vs the ESIC 8-chip spec — this appears intentional per the different portal flows, but if the review intended UAN to also have an 8-chip strip, that is a spec question for E1 (I treated it as portal-appropriate).
Optional: same pre-existing deprecated shadow*/outline/background/padding-shorthand warnings can be cleaned in a global sweep.
critical_code_review_comments: portal_generation.py OTP endpoint: sanitises code to digits and enforces 4-8 length before touching Mongo — good.

portal_generation.py /live endpoint: excludes screenshot_base64 from the steps projection to keep payload small, but still returns live_frame_base64 top-level — correct trade-off since the poller only needs the newest frame.

statutory_registration.py /{portal}/employee/{user_id}/prefill: merges the open registration's snapshot on top of the user snapshot when present — good UX because in-progress edits survive page reloads.
statutory-registration-form.tsx (~430 lines) is well-scoped; splits fields via a small schema + generic Field renderer. All key inputs have testID prefixes (field-*, btn-*).
LiveRunViewer.tsx (~180 lines) polls every 2s; handles awaiting_otp state with the testID live-otp-* inputs — clean and reusable.
One-click 'Register on Portal' from eligible tab correctly reuses the create+submit path server-side (POST /{portal}/registrations then internal submit) — no duplicated logic on the client.
The prefill endpoint scope-checks via _load_emp_scoped which correctly gates company_admin/sub_admin — verified 401/403 for unauth.

success_rate.frontend: 100% for tested flows (form page, flow strip, 3 buttons, one-click register, LiveRunViewer, action-required badge, queue detail modal live view)

seed_data_creation: None persisted. Two statutory_registrations + two portal_automation_jobs were created during UI testing and both were deleted post-run. TEST_JOB_ fake OTP doc created by pytest was removed in test_zzz_cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_iter196_prefill_live_otp.py for regression on the prefill/live/otp/bulk endpoints. Kankani has EPFO creds (UAN bulk → queued) but NOT ESIC creds (ESIC bulk → action_required immediately). RPA worker DOES run in this pod (Playwright Chromium installed) — datacenter IP is blocked by govt portals, so 'action_required + Portal blocked' + a live frame of the block page is EXPECTED SUCCESS. Live viewer testID: live-run-viewer. Aadhaar OTP box testIDs: live-otp-box / live-otp-input / live-otp-send. Form page testIDs: btn-register-now, btn-save-draft, btn-link-existing-form, btn-add-family-member, field-{key}, field-dispensary, field-nominee-name, btn-back. Eligible row buttons: btn-register-{uid}, btn-form-{uid}, btn-link-{uid}. To acquire admin token: POST /api/auth/admin-password-login {email:'sksharmaconsultancy@gmail.com', password:'sharma123'} → localStorage keys llc_session_token AND session_token.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found. All 9 review request items verified. One-click Register, form-page navigation, 8-chip flow strip, live streaming (with expected portal-blocked outcome from datacenter IP), OTP endpoint, prefill, and queue detail modal live view are all working end-to-end.
